<!-- DO NOT EDIT — generated by jackknife-maven-plugin. Regenerated on every `mvn jackknife:index`. -->

# Jackknife Usage

## Quick Start

Index files have been generated in `.jackknife/index/`. Use Grep to search them directly — no Maven needed.

## Directory Structure

```
.jackknife/
├── index/                   Index files (greppable, one per jar)
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.index
├── source/                  Cached decompiled source
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <ClassName>.java
├── instrument/              Instrumentation inbox (write configs here)
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.properties
├── modified/                Patched jars + moved configs (receipts)
│   └── <groupId>/
│       ├── <artifact>-<version>.jar
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.properties
└── USAGE.md                 This file (regenerated, do not edit)
```

## Index File Format

Each `.index` file is flat text, one class per block, blank-line separated.

```
# com.example.MyClass
public class com.example.MyClass extends com.example.AbstractBase
implements java.io.Serializable
@jakarta.inject.Named
  private final field name : java.lang.String
  public method process(java.lang.String input, int count) : boolean
    declares java.io.IOException
    throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
  public static method getInstance() : com.example.MyClass
```

Resources are listed at the end under `# resources`.

## Common Grep Patterns

Find a class by name:
```
grep -r 'DefaultRetryHandler' .jackknife/index/
```

Find all implementations of an interface:
```
grep -r 'implements.*HttpRequestRetryHandler' .jackknife/index/
```

Find all classes with an annotation:
```
grep -r '@jakarta.ejb.Stateless' .jackknife/index/
```

Find methods that throw a specific exception:
```
grep -r 'throws.*IllegalStateException' .jackknife/index/
```

Find a resource file:
```
grep -r 'META-INF/services' .jackknife/index/
```

## Decompiling

To see the full source of a class:
```
mvn jackknife:decompile -Dclass=com.example.MyClass
```

Decompiled source is cached in `.jackknife/source/` for repeat access.

## Instrumenting

To instrument a method for runtime observation:
```
mvn jackknife:instrument -Dmethod="com.example.Foo.process(String, int)" -Dmode=debug
```

Modes:
- `debug` — logs method entry (args), exit (return value), and any thrown exceptions
- `timing` — logs elapsed time only (lightweight, no value capture)

The method parser is forgiving — you can paste from index output or use shorthand.
Method-name-only targets all matching methods across classes.

Instrumented jars are applied automatically on the next build.
Remove from `.jackknife/modified/` to revert.
